summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Facial Recognition Social Tracker app. All core functionality working perfectly including person CRUD operations, social network management, photo upload with face detection simulation, and UI interactions.

design_issues.issue: Minor accessibility warning for DialogContent missing Description

passed_tests: Backend API health check and connectivity
Photo upload with face detection simulation
Social network toggles for all 12 networks
Person creation and display on dashboard
Person cards showing correct social counts
Delete from both dashboard card and detail page
